title: Vangviang Heat Wave
lead: Vangviang is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.89. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Vangviang has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 12.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is extremely low at 1.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) with a value of 0.0 GG further emphasizes the intensity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
